projects.summary: Wärtsilä is delivering a 100 MW / 223 MWh BESS for Flow Power in Victoria, with the order booked in Q4 2025. Construction is set to commence in 2026 and operations expected in 2028.
projects.statusNote: Construction to commence in 2026, operational in 2028.

projects.summary: A new mega solar farm in Victoria that began exporting small amounts of electricity in November 2025 and is expected to be fully operational in 2026.
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Q3 2026 - Q4 2026 (for final QAQC/commissioning support)
projects.statusNote: Began exporting small amounts of electricity in November 2025, full operations in 2026.

projects.projectName: CleanPeak Energy Solar & BESS Portfolio (Ashley, Gunnedah, Dubbo, Culcairn, Warialda)
projects.location: Ashley, Gunnedah, Dubbo, Culcairn (NSW); Warialda (NSW - pending DA)
projects.summary: CleanPeak Energy acquired five new solar farm development sites in NSW from Fortitude Renewables in January 2026. Each site has development approval and connection agreement for a 5MW solar farm and battery energy storage.
projects.statusNote: Four projects acquired, one pending DA approval.

projects.location: 1-5 Khartoum Road, Macquarie Park, Sydney, New South Wales
projects.summary: The NSW government approved plans for a new hyperscale data centre development at Stockland's MPark precinct in Macquarie Park, Sydney, in March 2026.
projects.statusNote: Planning approval granted March 2026. Moving to detailed design and construction tendering. Construction timing not yet confirmed.

projects.projectName: Central Geradora Fotovoltaica Cruz Alta (13 plants)
projects.location: Bonito and Mulungu do Morro, Bahia
projects.summary: Aneel granted approval for 13 new solar projects totaling 180 MW to Central Geradora Fotovoltaica Cruz Alta in Bonito and Mulungu do Morro, Bahia, in June 2026.
projects.statusNote: Aneel approval (Despacho de Requerimento de Outorga - DRO) obtained June 2026.

projects.summary: A new solar project for independent energy production in Santana do Ipanema, Alagoas, received Aneel approval in June 2026.
projects.statusNote: Aneel approval (Despacho de Requerimento de Outorga - DRO) obtained June 2026.

projects.projectName: Itaipu Binacional Floating Solar BESS Integration
projects.location: Paraguayan side of Itaipu reservoir (for existing floating solar), but BESS integration is new.
projects.summary: Itaipu Binacional confirmed in July 2026 its intention to install a battery storage system at its floating solar plant to evaluate solar-storage integration and grid stability.
projects.statusNote: Currently studying the installation of the battery storage system.

projects.summary: NSW Government investing $225 million in 2026 budget for critical grid upgrades in the South West REZ to unlock 1.3 GW network capacity, enabling four new wind, solar, and battery projects. Early works contractors to be appointed, long-lead items procurement underway.
projects.statusNote: Early works contractors to be appointed, long-lead items procurement underway.

projects.summary: One of four projects enabled by the South West REZ grid upgrades. Progressing due to NSW government investment in REZ infrastructure.
projects.statusNote: Progressing due to NSW government investment in REZ infrastructure.

projects.summary: One of four projects enabled by the South West REZ grid upgrades. Progressing due to NSW government investment in REZ infrastructure.
projects.statusNote: Progressing due to NSW government investment in REZ infrastructure.

projects.summary: One of four projects enabled by the South West REZ grid upgrades. Progressing due to NSW government investment in REZ infrastructure.
projects.statusNote: Progressing due to NSW government investment in REZ infrastructure.

projects.summary: One of four projects enabled by the South West REZ grid upgrades. Progressing due to NSW government investment in REZ infrastructure.
projects.statusNote: Progressing due to NSW government investment in REZ infrastructure.

projects.location: New England and Upper Hunter regions, NSW
projects.summary: EnergyCo is finalizing the Access Scheme for the New England REZ, with the Draft Declaration released by end of June 2026 and formal declaration by end of September 2026. Access Scheme finalization is a key step before individual project procurement.
projects.statusNote: Access Scheme finalization is a key step before individual project procurement.

projects.summary: A new hybrid renewables hub combining up to 850 MW of wind, 500 MW of solar, and a 500 MW, four-hour battery (2000 MWh) in early stages of development, adjacent to the CopperString transmission project. Ecological surveys and grid connection options studies are set to begin shortly.
projects.statusNote: Ecological surveys and grid connection options studies are set to begin shortly.

projects.summary: Goldwind Australia has lodged applications for a new 600 MW wind farm with up to 250 MW / 1000 MWh of DC-coupled or AC-coupled battery storage. Applications lodged with federal and state governments.
projects.statusNote: Applications lodged with federal and state governments.

projects.summary: ARENA has committed up to $45 million to support Sicona Battery Technologies to demonstrate commercial-scale manufacturing of its advanced silicon-carbon battery anode material, SiCx™, in the Illawarra region. Project involves construction and operation of a commercial-scale demonstration facility.
projects.statusNote: Project involves construction and operation of a commercial-scale demonstration facility.

projects.summary: AEMO is calling for non-network options for this newly actionable ISP project, with submissions due by September 17, 2026. Consultation on non-network options is active.
projects.statusNote: Consultation on non-network options is active.

projects.summary: AEMO is calling for non-network options for this newly actionable ISP project, with submissions due by September 17, 2026. Consultation on non-network options is active.
projects.statusNote: Consultation on non-network options is active.

projects.summary: AEMO is calling for non-network options for this newly actionable ISP project, with submissions due by September 17, 2026. Consultation on non-network options is active.
projects.statusNote: Consultation on non-network options is active.

projects.location: Goiás, Paraná, Mato Grosso do Sul
projects.summary: ANEEL has approved the draft tender for Transmission Auction 4/2026, scheduled for October 30, 2026, with Lot 4 being the largest at R$4.1 billion, involving transmission lines and substations. Draft tender approved and sent to TCU for verification.
projects.statusNote: Draft tender approved and sent to TCU for verification.

projects.summary: Evolua Energia plans to energize 26 new solar plants in 2026, investing R$260 million. Projects are in the energizing phase, implying construction is advanced or complete.
projects.statusNote: Projects are in the energizing phase, implying construction is advanced or complete.

projects.location: São Paulo, Mato Grosso, Mato Grosso do Sul
projects.summary: Axia Energia won Lots 8, 9, and 10 in the ANEEL Transmission Auction 1/2026, involving new transmission lines and 1200 MVA in additional capacity across São Paulo, Mato Grosso, and Mato Grosso do Sul. Contracts awarded in July 2026.
projects.statusNote: Contracts awarded in July 2026.

projects.summary: Alupar won Lot 1 in the ANEEL Transmission Auction 1/2026, involving 35 km of underground lines and 1200 MVA transformation capacity in São Paulo. Contracts awarded in July 2026.
projects.statusNote: Contracts awarded in July 2026.
